directions_tried.name: Phase 1: Three parallel finishing explorations
directions_tried.outcome: All three succeeded. Santos connection definitional but valid. Physical-τ hydrogen T_ion table complete. 3D ZPF correlator derived analytically.

directions_tried.name: Phase 2: Adversarial synthesis
directions_tried.outcome: Tier 4. Grand conclusion (field quantization necessary) not novel — Santos/Nieuwenhuizen already stated it. Mission contribution: systematic quantitative evidence across 3 systems. Best novel output: convergence law τ^0.23 × ω_max^{-0.18}.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Santos (2022) O(ħ²) framework connection to measured SED discrepancies
explorations_completed.key_finding: Santos confirms 15-18% IS missing O(ħ²) Moyal term (definitional). Slope=1.049 is simulation artifact, not O(ħ²). Hierarchy: classical(0.183) < QM(0.257) < ALD(0.303).

explorations_completed.goal_summary: SED hydrogen T_ion(L) with physical τ = 2.591e-7 a.u.
explorations_completed.key_finding: L=1.0 does eventually ionize (18/20 in 50k periods, median 19,223 periods); T_ion ∝ L^6.44; ⟨r⟩(L=1.0) = 1.509 ≈ QM 1s

explorations_completed.goal_summary: 3D ZPF two-point correlator — does orientational average kill C_xx(d)?
explorations_completed.key_finding: C_xx(d) = j₀(q) - j₂(q)/2 (non-zero, oscillating ~1/d decay). SED-QM discrepancy persists in 3D.

explorations_completed.goal_summary: Adversarial synthesis of all claims + grand synthesis answering central mission question
explorations_completed.key_finding: Grand conclusion not novel (Nieuwenhuizen 2020). Mission contribution: convergence law τ^0.23×ω_max^{-0.18} and T_ion(L)∝L^6.44 are best novel outputs. All 7 claims adversarially reviewed.
